WMS365 Receiving
Warehouse
Receiving Index Drill into scan and batch receiving work

Scan & Stage

Add scans to a batch first, then save the batch into the shared inventory server.

No saved location yet
Core scan flow
Start with location, item, quantity, and tracking. The active company comes from the global company selector above.

Traceability

Lot and expiration are only required for items that have those controls turned on in the item master.

Quick Qty Helper Use case pack math when you are counting unit-tracked inventory by case.
Optional Item Details Add a description and photo when they help your team identify the item faster later.
Compressed photo preview
Add items to the open batch as you go. Save to inventory when the batch is ready for everyone to see.

Current Batch

Review staged scans before saving them.

0 lines staged

Your batch is empty. Add scans here, then save them to inventory in one step.

WMS365 Lookup
Warehouse

Search Tasks

Pick one search tool at a time, like the original mobile flow.

Search Inventory

Search by SKU, UPC, location, or a list of item codes.

Run a search to see location breakdowns, matched quantities, and inventory lines.

Search Results

Results are pulled from the shared live inventory on the server.

Run a search to see location breakdowns, matched quantities, and inventory lines.

Master Data & Setup

Maintain companies, BINs, items, portal users, and saved warehouse shortcuts outside the daily receiving screen.

Super User Company Setup

Create the company, choose the starting modules, then jump directly into portal access, billing, integrations, or feature access.

Fast path for onboarding
1. CompanySave the account profile.
2. LocationAssign the primary warehouse or 3PL partner.
3. FeaturesTurn on the modules this customer needs.
4. DataAdd portal access, items, rates, and integrations.
Company Setup

Customer Account & Default Location

Company records stay separate from the physical warehouse or 3PL partner doing the work.

Company Profile

Pricing & Paywall

Marketplace SKU Mapping

Map Shopify, SFTP, Best Buy, or marketplace item numbers to this local WMS item so imported orders use the correct warehouse SKU.

Open a saved item to manage store SKU mappings.

Related Inventory

Open a saved item to see where inventory is stored, committed, and available.

No saved item selected.

Bulk Upload BIN Locations

Desktop only. Save your Excel sheet as CSV, then upload BINs with columns like BIN and NOTE.

Example columns: BIN, NOTE

Bulk Upload Item Masters

Desktop only. Save one row per company plus SKU so scan autofill, item lookup, and reports stay clean.

Example columns: VENDOR_CUSTOMER, SKU, UPC, DESCRIPTION, IMAGE_URL, TRACKING, UNITS_PER_CASE, EACH_LENGTH, EACH_WIDTH, EACH_HEIGHT, CASE_LENGTH, CASE_WIDTH, CASE_HEIGHT

Company Portal Access

Add one or more portal users under the same company. Each user logs in with their own email and password.

Portal Permissions

Saved Portal Users

Multiple users can be saved under the same company. Last login is tracked per user.

0 users

No portal users saved yet.

Marketplace Connections

Connect each customer's Shopify, Best Buy, Amazon, marketplace, or SFTP order lane and keep all imported orders company-safe.

Active Company

Choose an active company in the header before saving a store connection.

Connect a Store or Marketplace

Select a channel first, then enter the credentials below for the active company.

Best Buy included

Shopify Client Credentials

Optional alternative to a direct Admin API token. Save the client ID and client secret here and WMS365 will fetch the short-lived Shopify access token automatically during sync.

Opens Shopify authorization and saves the Admin API token securely under this company.

SFTP Sync Lanes

Leave any folder blank to turn that lane off. Orders and purchase orders import from JSON files, and confirmations plus inventory export back as JSON files.

Business Central API

Use a Microsoft Entra app registration with Business Central API permissions. Sync pulls master customers and item/SKU records into the active WMS365 company.

Sync Schedule

Manual sync is on. Save an active connection to start scheduled imports and exports.

Provider Notes

Use the Shopify shop's .myshopify.com domain with either a direct Admin API access token or the app's client ID + client secret. When client credentials are saved, WMS365 will fetch the short-lived Shopify access token automatically during sync.

Saved Marketplace Connections

Connections are scoped to one company, so imported marketplace and store orders stay customer-safe.

0 connections

No marketplace connections saved yet.

Bulk uploads use CSV so Excel files can be saved, imported, edited, and exported again without extra tooling.

Saved Companies

Tap Use to load the company faster; Location opens its assigned warehouse/3PL setup.

No companies saved yet. Add them here so they show up as autocomplete options.

Saved BINs

Tap Use to fill the scan location on mobile or desktop.

No BINs saved yet. Add your most-used locations here for faster lookup.

Saved Items

0 saved

WMS365 Move Stock
Warehouse

Stock Actions

Open one action at a time so the mobile flow stays simple.

Customer Display Build / Kitting Requests

Customer-submitted display build, kit, de-kit, and re-SKU work. Complete the physical work, then use Convert Item to update stock.

Review customer display build requests first. Mark the request status here, then update stock with Convert Item after the warehouse work is complete.

No customer kitting requests yet.

Remove Or Delete

Remove part of a quantity or delete the full line from a location.

Move Item

Scan from, to, SKU. Quantity fills with available stock and can be changed for a partial move.

Put Away Stock

Move received stock from a dock, receiving, or staging location into its final storage BIN.

Convert Item

Change inventory from one item into another using the case pack math saved on the item masters.

Choose company, source location, source item, quantity, and target item to preview the conversion.

BIN To BIN Move

Move every inventory line from one location or bin into another.

Recent Activity

The latest inventory and library changes saved on the shared server.

Inventory and library changes will appear here after you save, delete, transfer, move, import, or add master data.

Use the Backup tab to move or restore the shared server data when needed.

Bulk Inventory Worksheet

Edit stock like a spreadsheet for the active company. Export CSV, update NEW_LOCATION, LOT, EXPIRATION_DATE, or QTY, then upload and save all changes together.

Choose an active company
Bulk edits are locked to the active company in the header so one customer cannot affect another customer's stock. Use Remove on an existing row to delete it.

Choose an active company to open the bulk inventory worksheet.

Action New Location SKU UPC Lot Expiration Tracking Qty Description

Warehouse

Reports & Counts

Review pending mobile inventory counts, filter live inventory, print report snapshots, and export Excel-friendly CSV files from the desktop view.

Report Snapshot

Designed to stay readable on mobile, but especially useful on desktop for quick reporting and exports.

Reported Companies0
Pallet Locations0
Reported Qty0
Reported Pallets0

Company utilization shows pallet usage by company. Location and item reports stay on the desktop side for deeper review.

Inventory Count Review

Mobile counts stay pending here until a desktop user edits, rejects, or posts the adjustment.

No pending inventory counts are waiting for review.

WMS365 Billing
Warehouse

Warehouse Billing

Assign fees by company, let warehouse transactions create billing lines automatically, then export invoice-ready detail for Zoho.

Billing Snapshot

Open billing stays separate from invoiced history so the warehouse team can keep the month clean.

Active Fees0
Open Lines0
Open Amount$0.00
Filtered Amount$0.00

Auto-billing currently covers receiving batch saves, shipped portal orders, and monthly storage generation. Everything else can be added manually.

Company Fee Setup

Enable only the fees this company uses and set their agreed rate once.

Choose a company

Choose a company to assign warehouse billing rates.

On Category Fee Unit Rate Note

Manual Billing Line

Use this for labour, special handling, materials, container unloads, and any service that is not auto-generated.

Choose a company and fee to add a manual billing line.

Billing Ledger

Filter the billing queue before exporting to Zoho or marking those lines invoiced.

No billing lines match the current filter yet.

WMS365 Data Admin
Warehouse

Export

Download a backup or a CSV inventory snapshot whenever you want.

JSON includes the shared server inventory, recent activity, saved BINs, and item masters. CSV exports the current inventory table for spreadsheets.

Import

Restore a previously exported JSON backup into this browser.

Import replaces the shared server inventory, recent activity, saved BINs, and item masters for everyone using this app.

Company Email Flow Check

See exactly where portal order release emails will go for one company, then send a routing test to those recipients.

Super users only
Super user access is required to check company email routing.

System Email Test

Send a live test email from the configured WMS365 SMTP account to verify notifications are working.

Super users only
Super user access is required to send system email tests.

Email Queue / Delivery Log

Review recent WMS365 emails sent to warehouses, customers, portal users, and admins.

Super users only
Super user access is required to view the email delivery log.

Company Feature Access

Super users can decide which customer-facing and billable add-ons are enabled for each company.

0 companies
Super user access is required to change company feature access.

Choose a company

Pick a company in the header to review and save which modules are enabled.

No company selected yet.

Company Access Summary

Use Manage to switch the active company and review its enabled feature set.

Warehouse Users

Create warehouse logins, assign the warehouses each worker can manage, and keep super users separate from scoped users.

0 users
Super user access is required to manage warehouse users.

New Warehouse User

Create the login first, then assign the warehouses that worker should manage.

Assigned Warehouses / 3PL Locations

Warehouse users inherit every company assigned to the warehouses checked here.

Save a warehouse or 3PL location first, then assign it to warehouse users here.

Advanced: Direct Company Overrides

Optional. Use this only when a worker needs access to a company outside their assigned warehouse.

Save a few companies first, then add direct overrides here if needed.

Saved Warehouse Users

Use Manage to reload a user, update their password, or change their assigned warehouses.

WMS365 Labels
Warehouse

Label Builder

Create location labels, or scan and manage pallet labels that can be reassigned and reprinted.

Create Labels

Pull From Saved BINs

Use the shared BIN library or current inventory locations to build labels faster. Only codes that look like rack/bin labels will be added automatically.

0 matching saved BIN labels are available.

Pallet Workflow

Printing Note

Printing from this page works on the current device right away. Warehouse direct print sends pick tickets and packing slips to the local WMS365 Print Agent installed near the warehouse printers.

Warehouse Direct Print

Register print stations, assign printer roles, and monitor queued warehouse print jobs.

Agent setup file: print-agent/README.md

New Print Station

Assign Printer

Load setup to view print stations, printers, and recent jobs.

Location Label Preview

Preview 4 x 6 landscape labels before printing. The pallet queue stays on this device, while saved pallet records live on the shared server.

No labels queued yet. Add one, paste a list, or pull matching BINs from the shared location library.
